evidence.description: Hashemi was a close confidant of Montazeri's circle. His brother Hadi was Montazeri's son-in-law. After the death of Montazeri's son Mohammad in 1981, Hashemi took control of Montazeri's armed followers.

editorial_notes: Brother Hadi married into Montazeri family. Hashemi controlled Montazeri's armed followers after death of Montazeri's son Mohammad (1981).
